description: Implement LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT as roadmap item 11. Create governance contract system for routing decisions, ledger writing responsibilities, and next actor selection governance based on completed executor/auditor exchange ledger loop foundation.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR / AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP) to next sequential item 11 (LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT)
